content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the left ahead with the dashed center line visible, and the car appears to be navigating the left-hand bend successfully.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 39, target = (39 + 5) % 121 = 44
- Target waypoint 44: (6.0793, 2.7734)
- Car: x=6.7864, y=2.3888, heading=122.30°
- dy = 2.7734 - 2.3888 = 0.3846
- dx = 6.0793 - 6.7864 = -0.7071
- bearing = atan2(0.3846, -0.7071) = 180° - atan2(0.3846, 0.7071) = 180° - 28.6° = 151.4°
- delta = 151.4° - 122.30° = +29.1°
- |delta| ≈ 29° → moderate left, use 15° steering at speed 1.5

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track continues curving left and waypoint 44 is to the left of current heading (delta=+29.1°), maintaining 15° positive steering to follow the waypoint line through the continuing left curve.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track has a long straight heading east (~0°), then curves sharply left around WP26-42",
    "After left curve peak (~WP43+), track heads west then loops back south",
    "Positive steering = left turn, negative = right turn",
    "On straights with |delta|<5°, use steering_angle=0 to avoid oscillation",
    "Car is left of center (~0.18m) — acceptable while navigating left curve",
    "Speed 1.5 is safe on moderate curves; reduce to 1.0 or 0.75 for sharp turns",
    "Delta holding around +27-29° through this curve — 15° left correction working well",
    "After WP44+, heading will start decreasing (turning right/west) — prepare for negative steering",
    "Waypoint target index = nearest_waypoints[1]+5 consistently used",
    "Car progressing smoothly through curve, heading increasing from 98° to 122°"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [6.981, 6.942, 6.921, 6.856, 6.786],
    "y": [2.147, 2.198, 2.240, 2.320, 2.389],
    "yaw": [104.58, 107.5, 110.79, 116.68, 122.30]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP44 at (6.079, 2.773): dy=0.385, dx=-0.707, bearing=151.4°, delta=+29.1° → moderate left, steer 15°",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 15.0
}
```
